name: fluxcd
description: Expert guide for Flux CD GitOps on Kubernetes: install and bootstrap, repository structure, Flux resources, SOPS/RBAC security, schema validation, operations, upgrades, and troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Flux CD GitOps guidance for Kubernetes
interface.longDescription: Use FluxCD to plan, install, secure, validate, operate, upgrade, and troubleshoot Flux CD GitOps workflows on Kubernetes with version-aware official documentation references.
defaultPrompt: Use FluxCD to audit this GitOps repository.
Use FluxCD to troubleshoot this reconciliation failure.
Use FluxCD to design a secure bootstrap plan.
